name: Warranty & Operations Handoff
description: Bridge construction to building operations with warranty tracking, claim management, and searchable decision archive. Every PM decision made during construction becomes queryable building history for facility managers.

before.claimProcess: Phone calls, email chains, lost documentation
before.facilityManagerQueries: Call contractor, wait days for answer

after.buildingHistory: Searchable decision archive with spatial context
after.facilityManagerQueries: Ask SEPPA, get answer with rationale in seconds

value.differentiator: Only platform preserving construction decisions for operations

milestones.name: Warranty Registry Database
milestones.description: Database for warranty records with expiration tracking
deliverables: Prisma models for Warranty, WarrantyClaim, BuildingHistory

milestones.name: Warranty Management Interface
milestones.description: Interface for managing warranties and claims

milestones.name: MCP Tools & CMMS Integration
milestones.description: MCP tools and external system integration

facilityManagerScenarios.scenario: Why is the ceiling lower in Room 203?
facilityManagerScenarios.response: Room 203 ceiling height was modified per DEC-2026-0234. Original: 9'-6" AFF, As-built: 9'-0" AFF. Reason: HVAC duct routing conflict. Approved by PMT.

facilityManagerScenarios.scenario: When was the HVAC unit in Mechanical Room 2 installed?
facilityManagerScenarios.response: AHU-2 installed March 15, 2026. Serial: XYZ123. Warranty expires March 14, 2031. Vendor: ABC Mechanical.

facilityManagerScenarios.scenario: What decisions affected the fire sprinkler layout on Level 2?
facilityManagerScenarios.response: 3 decisions affected Level 2 sprinkler layout: DEC-0089 (head relocation), DEC-0156 (pipe reroute), DEC-0201 (coverage adjustment).

seppa.description: Natural language queries about building history
seppa.capability: SEPPA can answer facility manager questions using decision archive

cmms.description: Export PM schedules and decision history to CMMS

digitalTwin.capability: Click any element to see construction decision history

documents.description: Link to as-built drawings, O&M manuals, spec sections
